toolbox.title: Fields
toolbox.description: Drag and drop, or select and double click, to place fields on the Document.
toolbox.signaturetooltip: Use this field to collect Signatures from Participants
toolbox.autosigntooltip: Auto-Sign lets Senders add a Signature to the Document that will be automatically applied upon Sending
toolbox.texttooltip: A field for collecting any plain text values such as: names, addresses or descriptions
toolbox.signingdatetooltip: Automatically inserts the date upon completion by the assigned Participant
toolbox.datetooltip: A field for collecting dates with built-in date formatting options
toolbox.emailtooltip: A Field to only accept entries formatted as an email address (e.g., example@example.com)
toolbox.initialstooltip: Use this field anywhere Participants are required to Initial your document
toolbox.numbertooltip: A Field to only accept entries in numerical format. Additional validations include character limit (1 to 12 digits), and currency format (2 decimal places)
toolbox.dropdowntooltip: Use this field to create custom dropdown menus in your document, or place one of our handy presets for countries or prefixes
toolbox.checkboxtooltip: Places a checkbox on your document. Handy for T&Cs or  ✔/✗ sections
toolbox.regextooltip: Need a specific validation? Use this field to enter a custom RegEx and have Participants enter exactly what you need
toolbox.imagetooltip: Use when you need Participants to upload their own images during the signing process
toolbox.filetooltip: Use when you need Participants to upload their own documents during the signing process
toolbox.drawntooltip: Allow users to draw on the document using their mouse or touchscreen

featurecolumn.fieldtypestooltip: Select and place Form Field Elements
featurecolumn.recipientstooltip: View the list of Recipients for this document
featurecolumn.validationtooltip: View the list of validation issues for this document

participants.title: Participants
participants.description: Select and Click to place Signature fields where you'd like on the Document.

recipients.title: Recipients & Fields
recipients.description: Select Recipient to Expand and Drag to place Signature fields where you'd like them to Sign.
recipients.recipientfieldsdescription: Select and Click to place Signature fields where on the Document.

documentoptions.title: Template Details
documentoptions.description: Details and insights about the Template.
documentoptions.name: Name
documentoptions.autoarchivedescription: After Sending the Template will be automatically archived.
documentoptions.locktemplatedescription: Lock Template to avoid changes being made
documentoptions.fixedsignatureaspectdescription: Fixes the aspect ratio of all signatures on the document

validation.description: This document needs fields added or corrected before it can be sent.

viewer.autherrormessage: Unable to load template. Please check your access token is valid and try again.

fieldproperties.fieldorderdescription: Determines what order fields will be filled in by the user
fieldproperties.linktypedescription: Determines in what way this field is linked to other fields
fieldproperties.linkvaluedescription: Fields with the same Link Value will be linked together
fieldproperties.fieldtypedescription: The Field you currently have selected
fieldproperties.fieldlabeldescription: Add a label to clarify the information required from the Recipient.
fieldproperties.valuedescription: A prefilled value that can be altered by the signer.
fieldproperties.optionsdescription: Define the options available in the dropdown. One option per line.

alignment.selectmultipledistribution: Select multiple Fields to to access distribution controls
alignment.selectmultiplescale: Select multiple Fields to to access scale controls
alignment.selectmultiplewidth: Select multiple Fields to to access match width controls
alignment.selectmultipleheight: Select multiple Fields to to access match height controls
alignment.matchsize: Make selected fields the same height and width as the first selected field
alignment.matchwidth: Make selected fields the same width as the first selected field
alignment.matchheight: Make selected fields the same height as the first selected field
